name: Orange Poppyseed Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt and poppyseeds in a large bowl.
2. Whisk eggs, sour cream, oil, orange juice and extract in another bowl.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture until just combined.
4. Divide the batter evenly among 24 greased muffin cups.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes or until golden brown.
